plato:hasService.rdfs:label: hasService
plato:hasService.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a machine offers a service that it can execute

plato:isProvidedBy.rdfs:label: isProvidedBy
plato:isProvidedBy.rdfs:comment: Used to state that a service is offered by a specific machine

plato:hasSubService.rdfs:label: hasSubService
plato:hasSubService.rdfs:comment: States that a service has a another service that is its subtask

plato:hasParameter.rdfs:label: hasParameter
plato:hasParameter.rdfs:comment: States that a service, a predicate, or a function has a parameter

plato:referencesNumericConstant.rdfs:label: referencesNumericConstant
plato:referencesNumericConstant.rdfs:comment: Used to reference a NumericConstant instance from a NumericConstantReference

plato:hasType.rdfs:label: hasType
plato:hasType.rdfs:comment: States that a service has a type

plato:hasSubType.rdfs:label: hasSubType
plato:hasSubType.rdfs:comment: States that a type has a direct sub-type

plato:hasPrecondition.rdfs:label: hasPrecondition
plato:hasPrecondition.rdfs:comment: States that a service has a precondition that must be satisfied before the service can be executed

plato:hasEffect.rdfs:label: hasEffect
plato:hasEffect.rdfs:comment: States that a service has an effect that changes the world state when the service is executed

plato:hasAWSSentence.rdfs:label: hasAWSSentence
plato:hasAWSSentence.rdfs:comment: States that a precondition or an effect has an AWSStatement

plato:hasAWSSubject.rdfs:label: hasAWSSubject
plato:hasAWSSubject.rdfs:comment: References the subject of an AWSSentence

plato:hasAWSPredicate.rdfs:label: hasAWSPredicate
plato:hasAWSPredicate.rdfs:comment: References the predicate of an AWSSentence

plato:hasAWSObject.rdfs:label: hasAWSObject
plato:hasAWSObject.rdfs:comment: References an object of the AWSSentence

plato:isAffectedBy.rdfs:label: isAffectedBy
plato:isAffectedBy.rdfs:comment: States that a precondition or effect binding is affected by a parameter

plato:onEntity.rdfs:label: onEntity
plato:onEntity.rdfs:comment: References a CostMapEntry or an InitialFunctionValue with an Entity

plato:hasEntityOrder.rdfs:label: hasEntityOrder
plato:hasEntityOrder.rdfs:comment: States that an instance has a group of ordered objectProperties relating to entities

plato:ordersEntity.rdfs:label: ordersEntity
plato:ordersEntity.rdfs:comment: References an entity or service (for subtask ordering) that is ordered by this instance of EntityOrder

plato:hasCost.rdfs:label: hasCost
plato:hasCost.rdfs:comment: States that the execution of a service leads to some costs.

plato:hasDuration.rdfs:label: hasDuration
plato:hasDuration.rdfs:comment: States that the execution of a service has a certain lead time.

plato:targetsFunction.rdfs:label: targetsFunction
plato:targetsFunction.rdfs:comment: States that some cost should be applied to a specific cost function

plato:hasCostEquation.rdfs:label: hasCostEquation
plato:hasCostEquation.rdfs:comment: Stated that a cost instance has an equation that determines the specific cost value. The cost instance can still have a static cost

plato:hasInitialValue.rdfs:label: hasInitialValue
plato:hasInitialValue.rdfs:comment: States than a function has a initial value for a specific set of parameter values

plato:hasSubpartA.rdfs:label: hasSubpartA
plato:hasSubpartA.rdfs:comment: Used to reference the first child node of a Binary Expression Tree node describing an equation

plato:hasSubpartB.rdfs:label: hasSubpartB
plato:hasSubpartB.rdfs:comment: Used to reference the second child node of a Binary Expression Tree node describing an equation

plato:representsValue.rdfs:label: representsValue
plato:representsValue.rdfs:comment: States that a CostEquationPart is a value.

plato:representsOperator.rdfs:label: representsOperator
plato:representsOperator.rdfs:comment: States that a CostEquationPart is an operator.

plato:representsFunctionCall.rdfs:label: representsFunctionCall
plato:representsFunctionCall.rdfs:comment: States that a CostEquationPart is a function call.

plato:referencesParameter.rdfs:label: referencesParameter
plato:referencesParameter.rdfs:comment: States that an EquationValue is determined by a parameter

plato:hasCostMap.rdfs:label: hasCostMap
plato:hasCostMap.rdfs:comment: Used for an plato:EquationValue that is determined by a non numeric parameter to map the parameter values to numeric values

plato:hasEntry.rdfs:label: hasEntry
plato:hasEntry.rdfs:comment: Used to add an entry to a plato:CostMap

plato:withParameter.rdfs:label: withParameter
plato:withParameter.rdfs:comment: Used to specify parameters for a function call or the target function of a service cost
